backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining CarListing and CallbackRequest types, pre-populated sample listings, and state maps for a used-car marketplace backend. Includes migration support and exposes CRUD operations for listings and callback requests.
backend/migration.mo: Motoko migration module that defines OldActor and NewActor types (both identical) and a no-op `run` function for schema migration between canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a bug-fix feature (car listings not appearing on Home/Listings pages) to specific frontend files, components, and test requirement REQ-28.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's or page's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Autohub React SPA, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the TypeScript entry point via a module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (Home, Listings, ListingDetail, SellCar, Admin, etc.) wrapped in a shared Layout with Navbar, Footer, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/BookingModal.tsx: Dialog modal for booking a car that displays Axis Bank transfer details with copy buttons, a file upload for payment receipts, and shows a success confirmation screen after submission via `useSubmitReceipt`.
frontend/src/components/CallbackRequestF: Collapsible card form that lets users request a seller callback by submitting their name, phone, and preferred time slot via the `useCreateCallbackRequest` mutation, with a success state and reset option.
frontend/src/components/CarCard.tsx: Renders a card UI for a single car listing with image, badges, price formatting, and key details (mileage, year, location), linking to the listing detail page.
frontend/src/components/CarImageViewer36: Interactive 360° image viewer component that supports drag (mouse/touch) and button navigation through an array of car images.
frontend/src/components/EmiCalculator.ts: Collapsible EMI calculator component that computes monthly installment, total payable, and total interest based on car price, down payment, interest rate, and tenure inputs.
frontend/src/components/FinanceOptions.t: Displays a tabbed list of bank and NBFC lenders with indicative interest rates and tenure, allowing users to send a loan enquiry via a toast notification.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer with brand info, quick navigation links, popular car brands, and contact details for the company owner.
frontend/src/components/LocationFilter.t: Two-level location filter component with cascading state and city dropdowns, resetting the city selection when the state changes.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with desktop and mobile menus, linking to main app routes and an admin dashboard, with a 'List Your Car' CTA button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context including login, logout, and identity state via an AuthClient, exposed through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on car listings and related data (callbacks, bookings), wrapping the ICP backend actor calls.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing fonts, Tailwind directives, and defining CSS custom properties for light/dark theme color tokens along with reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying summary cards and tabbed tables for car listings, callback requests, and booking records fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with a hero search section (query + location filter), stats bar, and a grid of up to 8 featured available car listings with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ListingDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single car listing showing an image gallery, car specs, seller info with masked phone, and tabs for 360 view, EMI calculator, finance options, and callback request form.
frontend/src/pages/Listings.tsx: Browsable car listings page with client-side filtering by search query, fuel type, transmission, location, and price range, plus sorting options and active filter count badges.
frontend/src/pages/ResaleValueChecker.ts: Form-based tool that collects car details (make, model, year, mileage, etc.) and calls a resale calculator utility to display an estimated market value with factor impact indicators.
frontend/src/pages/SellCar.tsx: Two-step multi-page form for creating a new car listing, collecting vehicle details in step 1 and seller/pricing info in step 2, then submitting via the createListing mutation.
frontend/src/pages/SellCarConfirmation.t: Success confirmation page shown after a listing is submitted, displaying the new listing ID and next-steps guidance with navigation buttons to view the listing or browse others.
frontend/src/pages/VehicleLookup.tsx: A page that lets users search for a car listing by registration number, displaying full vehicle specs, price, and masked seller contact info if found.
frontend/src/utils/emiCalculator.ts: Utility functions for calculating monthly EMI, total payable, total interest, and formatting amounts in INR using standard loan formulas.
frontend/src/utils/locationData.ts: Exports a comprehensive list of all Indian states and their cities, plus a Pan India constant, used for location-based filtering throughout the app.
frontend/src/utils/phoneNumberMasker.ts: Exports a single utility function that masks a phone number by showing only the first 4 digits followed by six asterisks for privacy.
frontend/src/utils/resaleCalculator.ts: Provides resale value estimation logic for used cars based on make, model, age, mileage, fuel type, transmission, and city, returning a price range with contributing factors.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall Autohub project state including version, feature list, architectural notes, known issues, and requirements for the used car marketplace application.
